certificateTemplate.title: Career Chaos Academy Role Certification
certificateTemplate.subtitle: Awarded for passing the final role-wise assessment.

assessments.title: Developer Final Certification Assessment
assessments.description: Role-specific final test using Developer skill tree skills, timed professional judgement, and a practical mini-game assessment.

questions.prompt: In a Developer final assessment, what is the safest first action when using Debugging?
options: Reproduce issue, capture evidence, and communicate the decision path.
Skip verification to finish quickly and fix problems later.
Ask another team to handle it without context.
Ignore time, documentation if the client is pressuring the team.
questions.explanation: The correct answer shows Debugging, evidence, communication, and professional control under time, documentation.

questions.prompt: In a Developer final assessment, what is the safest first action when using Code Review?
options: Read diff context, capture evidence, and communicate the decision path.
Skip verification to finish quickly and fix problems later.
Ask another team to handle it without context.
Ignore ethics, documentation if the client is pressuring the team.
questions.explanation: The correct answer shows Code Review, evidence, communication, and professional control under ethics, documentation.

questions.prompt: In a Developer final assessment, what is the safest first action when using Release Safety?
options: Identify last safe version, capture evidence, and communicate the decision path.
Skip verification to finish quickly and fix problems later.
Ask another team to handle it without context.
Ignore time, safety if the client is pressuring the team.
questions.explanation: The correct answer shows Release Safety, evidence, communication, and professional control under time, safety.

questions.prompt: A shortcut may improve the Developer task score but creates safety, privacy, or fairness risk. What should you do?
options: Reject the shortcut, document the risk, and propose a safer alternative.
Use the shortcut quietly because the final score matters most.
Hide the risk until the work is approved.
Blame another role if the shortcut fails.
questions.explanation: Certificates require professional ethics: safe alternatives, transparency, and documented risk control.

practicalMiniGame.title: Debugging Practical Challenge
practicalMiniGame.instructions: Complete a mini-game style task that proves Debugging: inspect the situation, choose the safest action, and explain your evidence.
